04 April 2026 Military News

Operations
Defense Policy / Programs
Defense Industry
Other Conflicts
News Reports

Current Operations

    Operation Epic Fury / Operation Roaring Lion | Operation True Promise 4

  • US Search For Missing Crew Member Continues, As Strike Reported Near Iran Nuclear Plant RFE/RL 04 Apr 2026 -- Rescue teams are continuing to search for a US crew member missing after their fighter jet was brought down over Iran, as reports emerged of a strike near the Bushehr nuclear power plant.
  • Even Top US Jets Face Risks: F-15 Incident Highlights Complex Airspace Over Iran RFE/RL 04 Apr 2026 -- A reported incident involving a US F-15 over Iran is drawing renewed scrutiny to the risks American aircraft face when operating in heavily defended airspace, underscoring a broader reality: Even one of the world's most successful fighter jets is not immune in contested environments.
  • 365 U.S. troops wounded in war with Iran: Pentagon Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 04 Apr 2026 -- As many as 365 U.S. troops have been wounded in action as of Friday since the United States and Israel launched massive attacks on Iran on Feb. 28, Xinhua reported citing an online update from the Pentagon.
  • US intelligence admits Iran repairs 'missile bunkers' within hours of attacks Press TV 04 Apr 2026 -- US intelligence agencies acknowledge that Iran is quickly repairing its "underground missile bunkers" and returning them to operation within hours.
  • At least 1,900 civilians killed in Iran due to US-Israeli aggression: Official Press TV 04 Apr 2026 -- Since the start of US-Israeli aggression against Iran, more than 1,900 civilians, including women and children, have been killed, and at least 20,000 others have been wounded, according to the Secretary General of the International Federation of Red Cross and Red Crescent Societies (IFRC).
  • Rescue Mission Races To Find Crew Member Of US Jet Downed Over Iran RFE/RL 04 Apr 2026 -- Rescue teams continue to search early on April 4 for a US crew member missing after their fighter jet was brought down over Iran, one of two American forces planes reportedly knocked out of the sky in the region a day earlier.

  • US-Israeli aggression on Iran: What happened on 36th day of the imposed war Press TV 04 Apr 2026 -- Thirty-six days into the US-Israeli war on Iran, launched on February 28 with the assassination of the Leader of the Islamic Revolution, Ayatollah Seyyed Ali Khamenei, and top-ranking commanders, the military aggression continues to target civilian and industrial infrastructure across the country.
  • True Promise 4: Iran and resistance axis ops. against US-Israeli assets on April 4 Press TV 04 Apr 2026 -- Iranian armed forces and resistance groups across the region continue to carry out retaliatory military operations against the United States and the Israeli regime.
  • Iran's missile strikes force 1,500 US sailors out of Bahrain: Report Press TV 04 Apr 2026 -- Hundreds of US sailors have been forced out of Bahrain after their base came under attack by Iran's retaliatory missile and drone strikes, a report says.
  • Iran Army conducts drone strikes against US bases in UAE, Kuwait Press TV 04 Apr 2026 -- Iran's Army has conducted new drone strikes targeting US military positions in the United Arab Emirates and Kuwait, as the US-Israeli war against the Islamic Republic entered its sixth week.
  • Iranian tribals struck two US Black Hawk helicopters in mountainous terrain: IRGC Press TV 04 Apr 2026 -- Iranian tribal fighters from central Kohgiluyeh and Boyer-Ahmad and Bakhtiari provinces struck two US Black Hawk helicopters that had entered Iranian airspace, the Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) said in a statement on Saturday.
  • Iranian Army strikes key sites at Israel's Ben Gurion Airport Press TV 04 Apr 2026 -- The Iranian Army says it has carried out a large-scale drone operation targeting key positions of the Israeli regime at Ben Gurion Airport.
  • IRGC Navy targets Israeli vessel near Strait of Hormuz, sets it ablaze Press TV 04 Apr 2026 -- The naval units of Iran's Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) have carried out a drone strike against an Israeli-owned merchant vessel close to the Strait of Hormuz in retaliation for the war of aggression imposed by Washington and the Tel Aviv regime against the Islamic Republic.
  • Iran hits US Patriot system, HIMARS rocket batteries in wave 95 of reprisal strikes Press TV 04 Apr 2026 -- The Islamic Revolution Guard Corps (IRGC) Aerospace Force and Naval Forces have launched precision strikes targeting a US Patriot missile defense system in northern Bahrain, among other key targets across the region, as part of the 95th wave of retaliatory operations.
  • IRGC: Israel's industrial, military sites targeted in latest strikes Press TV 04 Apr 2026 -- The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) says it has targeted the Israeli regime's industrial and military sites, as well as locations hosting commanders and army units, in the 94th wave of Operation True Promise 4.
  • Five injured as US-Israeli airstrikes target six petrochemical plants in Khuzestan Press TV 04 Apr 2026 -- US-Israeli airstrikes have targeted six petrochemical plants across the southwestern Iranian province of Khuzestan, leaving at least five wounded.
  • Iran's air defense network capable of destroying advanced hostile aircraft: Commander Press TV 04 Apr 2026 -- The commander of the Khatam al-Anbiya Joint Air Defense Headquarters says Iranian air defense systems are keeping a close eye on the enemies' fighter jets and drones, emphasizing they are fully capable of tracking and destroying advanced hostile aircraft by means of homegrown capabilities.

  • Trump Gives Tehran 48 Hours To Make Deal, Open Strait Or Face 'Hell,' As Aviator Search Goes On RFE/RL 04 Apr 2026 -- US President Donald Trump on April 4 told the Iranian regime that "time is running out" and that it must make a deal or open the crucial Strait of Hormuz to shipping or face "hell," renewing an earlier threat in which he vowed to send Iran "back to the stone ages."
  • Secretary Rubio Revokes Green Cards of Foreign Nationals with Ties to Iranian Terror Regime US Dept. of State 04 Apr 2026 -- Last night, the niece and grand niece of deceased Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps Major General Qasem Soleimani were arrested by federal agents following Secretary of State Marco Rubio's termination of their lawful permanent resident (LPR) status.

  • 'Gates of hell await you': Senior cmdr. warns aggressors against targeting Iran's infrastructure Press TV 04 Apr 2026 -- Iran's highest operational command unit has issued a stern warning to the United States and the Israeli regime, declaring that any attack on the Islamic Republic's infrastructure would open the "gates of hell" on the aggressors.
  • Trump must be removed instead of US military commanders: Senior Iranian official Press TV 04 Apr 2026 -- A senior Iranian official has sharply criticized recent claims about the country's air defense capabilities, suggesting that US President Donald Trump should be removed instead of military commanders.
  • Iran warns of radioactive catastrophe after 4th attack on Bushehr nuclear plant Press TV 04 Apr 2026 -- Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi has warned that recurrent attacks targeting the country's only nuclear power plant as part of the ongoing US-Israeli aggression could lead to a huge radiological catastrophe in the region.
  • 'This war is Israel's war': World facing 'security breakdown', says Qalibaf Press TV 04 Apr 2026 -- Iran's Parliament Speaker Mohammad Baqer Qalibaf says the ongoing aggression is "Israel's war," adding that its security repercussions and resulting losses have extended beyond the region and affected the wider world.
  • Araghchi: Conclusive, lasting end to illegal US-Israeli war a priority for Iran Press TV 04 Apr 2026 -- Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi says a "conclusive and lasting" end to the illegal war imposed on Iran by the United States and the Israeli regime since late last month is a priority for Tehran.
  • All US terrorists will ultimately flee region like USS Gerald R. Ford commander: IRGC Quds Force chief Press TV 04 Apr 2026 -- Chief Commander of the Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) Quds Force Brigadier General Esmaeil Qaani says "all American terrorists" will ultimately flee the region in the same way the USS Gerald R. Ford commander fled the Red Sea in the face of Iranian retaliatory strikes.
  • Tehran vows to target Israeli embassies in region if its missions come under fire Press TV 04 Apr 2026 -- Iran's highest operational command unit has warned that any aggression targeting the country's diplomatic missions will be met with retaliatory attacks on the Israeli regime's embassies across the region.
  • IRGC condemns US embassy attack in Riyadh, says Iran had nothing to do with it Press TV 04 Apr 2026 -- The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) says the Iranian Armed Forces had nothing to do with an attack on the US Embassy in Riyadh, warning regional countries of American-Zionist plots to sow seditions.
  • Iran Blasts US-Israeli Bombardment of Universities, Killing of Scientists Sputnik 04 Apr 2026 -- The US and Israel have attacked more than 30 Iranian universities since the start of this war, and murdered over 60 professors since June 2025, Minister of Science, Research and Technology Hossein Simaee Sarraf told Sputnik.
  • Consequences of Strikes on Iran's Bushehr NPP to Destroy Life in Arab Countries - Araghchi Sputnik 04 Apr 2026 -- Radioactive consequences from strikes on the Bushehr Nuclear Power Plant will destroy life in the capitals of Persian Gulf countries, not in Tehran, Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi said on Saturday.

  • US-Israeli Strike Kills Wife of Iran's Top Foreign Policy Advisor — Pezeshkian Sputnik 04 Apr 2026 -- The Iranian army confirmed that two US combat aircraft were shot down within 24 hours. One pilot is still missing in Iranian territory. According to US media reports, two rescue helicopters were hit by Iranian fire.
  • UN nuclear agency chief 'deeply concerned' by reports of latest attack on Iran power plant UN News 04 Apr 2026 -- Reports of yet another projectile strike near the Bushehr nuclear power plant prompted Rafael Grossi, head of the International Atomic Energy Agency (IAEA), to register his deep concern on Saturday.

  • Comment by Foreign Ministry Spokeswoman Maria Zakharova following a report on new shelling of Bushehr Nuclear Power Plant Russia Ministry of Foreign Affairs 04 Apr 2026
  • Nuclear Risk Rising Daily Amid Bushehr Nuclear Plant Attacks— Rosatom CEO Sputnik 04 Apr 2026 -- The events at Iran's Bushehr nuclear power plant are developing according to the most undesirable forecast, Russian nuclear power corporation Rosatom CEO Alexey Likhachev said on Saturday.

  • India says it made first oil purchase from Iran since 2019 without payment issues Press TV 04 Apr 2026 -- The Indian oil ministry says the country has purchased a first oil shipment from Iran in seven years amid restrictions on the flow of crude oil from the Persian Gulf resulting from US-Israeli aggression on Iran.

Defense Policy / Programs

  • USS Ashland Completes Ship Wartime Repair and Maintenance in the Philippines U.S. 7th Fleet 04 Apr 2026 -- Whidbey Island-class amphibious dock landing ship USS Ashland (LSD 48) completed a ship wartime repair and maintenance exercise (SWARMEX), April 5, as part of its scheduled port visit to Cebu.

  • Italian Eurofighters conclude NATO Air Policing Mission in Estonia following consecutive deployments NATO Allied Air Command 04 Apr 2026 -- The Italian Air Force has concluded its NATO Air Policing deployment at Ämari Air Base, Estonia, after completing two consecutive rotations in support of the Alliance's Baltic Air Policing mission. The Italian Eurofighter detachment now hands over responsibility to the incoming Portuguese Air Force, ensuring the continued protection of NATO airspace on the Alliances eastern flank.

  • NATO Actively Building Up Military Forces on Eastern Flank - Russian Foreign Ministry Sputnik 04 Apr 2026 -- The NATO bloc is actively building up its military potential on its eastern flank and has already undermined the security architecture in Europe, the Russian Foreign Ministry said on Saturday.

  • China-Pakistan joint naval exercise concludes in north Arabian Sea Global Times 04 Apr 2026 -- The China-Pakistan "Sea Guardian IV" joint naval exercise concluded on April 1, as the Chinese People's Liberation Army's (PLA) guided-missile frigate Daqing and Pakistani naval vessels parted ways in the northern Arabian Sea
  • China unveils next-generation electromagnetic gun with enhanced power and precision; design compact, minimizes shell cases, flash and noise: Chinese expert Global Times 04 Apr 2026 -- China's latest-generation domestically developed electromagnetic gun has completed testing, with its performance now meeting operational requirements, according to a report on a test video released by CCTV News on Saturday.

  • Secretary-General's message on the International Day for Mine Awareness and Assistance in Mine Action UN Secretary-General 04 Apr 2026
  • No: 60, 4 April 2026, Regarding 4 April, the International Day for Mine Awareness and Assistance in Mine Action Republic of Turkey Ministry of Foreign Affairs 04 Apr 2026
  • Statement by the Spokesperson on the International Day for Mine Awareness and Assistance in Mine Action European External Action Service (EEAS) 04 Apr 2026 -- Anti-personnel landmines, improvised explosive devices and explosive remnants of war continue to kill and maim civilians long after conflict ends. Children are disproportionately affected. Mines also obstruct humanitarian access, delay recovery and hold back development.

    Other Conflicts

  • Pakistan Condemns Vandalism Targeting UAE Embassy in Damascus Pakistan Ministry of Foreign Affairs 04 Apr 2026 -- Pakistan strongly condemns the incident of vandalism and unrest targeting the Embassy of the United Arab Emirates in Damascus.

  • Saudi Arabia Condemns Rapid Support Forces Attack on Al-Jabalain Hospital in Sudan's White Nile State SPA 04 Apr 2026 -- The Ministry of Foreign Affairs expressed the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia's condemnation and denunciation of the Rapid Support Forces' targeting of a hospital in Al-Jabalain, White Nile State, Sudan, which resulted in deaths and injuries, including among medical personnel

News Reports

  • The tanker Flora 1 is allowed to leave Sweden Police of Finland 04 Apr 2026 -- The investigations carried out since Friday morning have shown that environmental violations cannot be proven. Also, Cameroon has confirmed that the vessel is registered in their maritime register. This means that there is no possibility of further investigative measures. Flora 1 is now allowed to leave Sweden.

  • Saudi Arabia Achieves Historic Milestone with Launch of 'Shams' Satellite Aboard Artemis II Mission SPA 04 Apr 2026 -- The Saudi Space Agency announced today the successful launch and initial communication with the Saudi satellite "Shams," which was deployed aboard the Space Launch System (SLS) as part of the Artemis II mission. With this achievement, the Kingdom becomes the first Arab nation to participate in a space mission under the historic Artemis program, which aims to accelerate scientific innovation and foster high-impact international partnerships that contribute to shaping the future of space for humanity
  • Cube satellite to gauge space radiation for Artemis II mission KOREA.net 03 Apr 2026 -- K-RadCube, a domestically developed cube satellite to measure space radiation, on April 1 at 6:35 p.m. was launched aboard the Space Launch System rocket for the Artemis II lunar mission from the Kennedy Space Center in Florida.

  • PLA activities in the waters and airspace around Taiwan ROC MND 04 Apr 2026

  • Enlarged Plenary Meeting of DPRK Cabinet Held KCNA 04 Apr 2026 -- An enlarged plenary meeting of the Cabinet of the DPRK was held at the Cabinet through video-conferencing on Friday.
  • DPRK Farms Make Efforts to Cope with Drought KCNA 04 Apr 2026 -- The rural areas across the country concentrate their efforts on securing sufficient water resources and ensuring the full operation of irrigation equipment in order to cope with drought.
  • Congratulations to DPRK Premier KCNA 04 Apr 2026 -- Pak Thae Song, premier of the Cabinet of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea, received a congratulatory message from Li Qiang, premier of the State Council of the People's Republic of China, on March 27.
  • Congratulations to DPRK FM KCNA 04 Apr 2026 -- Choe Son Hui, foreign minister of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea, received a congratulatory message from Wang Yi, foreign minister of the People's Republic of China, on March 26.
  • Congratulations to Jo Yong Won KCNA 04 Apr 2026 -- Jo Yong Won, chairman of the Standing Committee of the Supreme People's Assembly of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea, received a congratulatory message from Zhao Leji, chairman of the Standing Committee of the National People's Congress of the People's Republic of China, on March 26.
  • KCNA Commentary on Japan's Dangerous Military Attempt KCNA 04 Apr 2026 -- Against the backdrop of massive structural reorganization among the Japanese armed forces this spring, the "Space Operations Group" under the Air "Self-Defense Force" was recently raised to the status of the "Space Operations Squadron".

  • Pakistan rejects misleading commentary on UAE Financial Deposits, reaffirms strong partnership with UAE Pakistan Ministry of Foreign Affairs 04 Apr 2026 -- The Ministry of Foreign Affairs categorically rejects the recent misleading and unfounded commentary regarding financial deposits from the United Arab Emirates (UAE) held with the State Bank of Pakistan (SBP).

  • German foreign minister calls for ending EU unanimity principle Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 04 Apr 2026 -- Germany's foreign minister on Saturday called for the European Union to end its unanimity principle in decision-making, especially in foreign and security policy, Anadolu Agency reported.
